AI keynote speaker. Community builder. Technology-for-justice operator.

Authored judgment for generative everything.

Building the trust layer and the public room for responsible AI in British Columbia through BC + AI's year-round ecosystem and Futureproof Festival's flagship gathering.

Executive Director, BC + AI Founder / Lead Curator, Futureproof Festival AI keynote speaker Culture, code, community
Book a keynote See current work
Photo: CreativeMornings Vancouver Source: Punk Rock AI media archive

Where my energy is going now

Two live builds: the ecosystem and the festival.

BC + AI is the year-round trust layer. Futureproof is the flagship public room. Together, they are where the work turns from AI talk into community infrastructure people can use.

Ecosystem

BC + AI Ecosystem

The member-supported, province-wide community for responsible AI in British Columbia: public learning, local meetups, certification, policy conversations, and practical adoption rooted in trust.
Festival

Futureproof Festival

The October 28-30 flagship gathering where the ecosystem becomes visible: talks, film, demos, performance, ethics, sponsors, and public proof that AI culture can still be human.
Join BC + AI See the Futureproof program

What I get hired for

Rooms that need clarity, courage, and a useful next step.

Keynotes

Keynotes that move rooms

Plain-English talks on AI, taste, ethics, creativity, and human agency. No hype. No doom sermon. A better frame for the room.

Book a keynote
Workshops

Workshops that change teams

Practical AI learning for creative teams, leadership offsites, associations, and organizations that need shared language fast.

Work with me
Networks

Ecosystem work that builds durable networks

Community strategy, salons, partner rooms, and public-interest infrastructure for people trying to build with the future, not just talk about it.

See current work

Related creative lab

Portals, talks, and training that feed the work.

These projects stay close to the main builds: they are how ideas get tested on stage, in workshops, in public notes, and with creative teams.

BC + AI room

Vancouver AI

The monthly room inside the BC + AI ecosystem where artists, engineers, researchers, founders, and civic builders meet in person.
Keynote portal

Punk Rock AI

Make culture, not content. A creative rebellion with tools, prompts, and stage receipts.
Talk world

Both Hands Full

Critique in one hand. Agency in the other. A portal for filmmakers in the age of synthetic everything.
Training

The Upgrade AI

Practical AI fluency for creative professionals and teams who need useful workflows without surrendering judgment or taste.

Featured in

Proof without the logo soup.

BBC WIRED Forbes Reuters Time The Guardian Fast Company NPR

Recent and recurring stages

The rooms already know the work.

TEDx SXSW Web Summit PopTech CreativeMornings World AI Film Festival UN Microsoft Adobe Grammys

What people say

Fresh proof belongs here before launch.

The Stewart Butterfield quote can stay as an anchor. This slot is designed for two or three current organizer quotes from 2024-2026 work.

"Kris brought a rare mix of clarity, cultural fluency, and practical next steps. The room left with language they could actually use."

Event organizer quote - replace with verified 2024-2026 attribution

"He made the AI conversation feel less abstract, less performative, and much more human."

Workshop host quote - replace with verified attribution

"The value was not just inspiration. People left with a working frame for what to do next."

Leadership audience quote - replace with verified attribution

Field notes

Essays from the edge of AI, creativity, community, tools, taste, and what happens after the demo.

Read the field notes

Get the dispatch

The dispatch from the edge.

Weekly field notes on AI, creativity, and what's still ours to make. Sharp, useful, and short enough to actually read. Free.
